meta.title: NEW AI Video Editor makes Editing 10X Easier | Descript AI Tutorial
meta.description:
NEW AI Video Editor makes Editing 10X Easier | Descript AI Tutorial
Get started with Descript for free at https://get.descript.com/ffkf40ipgb5q ! You don’t need multiple subscriptions to different tools to create for all your platforms. You just need Descript.

Descript is an AI video editor that edits your videos based on the text transcript. With Descript you can easily remove mistakes, silences or retakes. Besides that you can easily add in captions, enhance the voice over with AI and you can even create a description with AI
